modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Logoff error occurs immediately after logging into Banner.

full_description_text: 
I am trying to access Banner, but after I log in, it kicks me out. The message I see says, "You have successfully logged out." This issue happens right after I enter my credentials, and it is very frustrating for me.
short_description: Logoff error occurs immediately after logging into Banner.
description: I am trying to access Banner, but after I log in, it kicks me out. The message I see says, "You have successfully logged out." This issue happens right after I enter my credentials, and it is very frustrating for me.
